options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are an expert extraction algorithm.
Only extract relevant information from the text.
If you do not know the value of an attribute asked to extract, you may omit the attribute's value.

parameters.content:
## Compara se o usuário existe
Verifica se ja exite via CPF

## GERA NOME USUARIO
comprara com a base de usuarios

parameters.command: =sshpass -p "Zaq!@wsx" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no suporte.pla@10.3.0.10 "powershell.exe -Command \"\$grupos = @('G_MDG_PrintScreen_Operacao', 'G_PLA_AdmLocal_Comercial', 'G_MDG_Comercial_R', 'G_MDG_RADIUS_AUTENTICACAO', 'G_MDG_ProxyComercial', 'G_MDG_Comercial_W'); foreach (\$grupo in \$grupos) { Add-ADGroupMember -Identity \$grupo -Members '{{ $json.USUARIO }}' }\""
